# egg-NOG-mapper

2.1.12

```{bash}
#| eval: false
#| include: true
# gffread -g Locusta_migratoria_v2.genome.fa -y locusta_proteins.fa Locusta_migratoria_v2_fixed.gff3
# 
# gffread -g Harmonia_axyridis.genome.fa -y harmonia_proteins.fa Harmonia_axyridis.gff3
# 
# gffread -g Plutella_xylostella.genome.fa -y plutella_proteins.fa Plutella_xylostella.gff3
# 
# gffread -g Drosophila_melanogaster.genome.fa -y drosophila_proteins.fa Drosophila_melanogaster.gff3
# 
# gffread -g Blattella_germanica.genome.fa -y blattella_proteins.fa Blattella_germanica.gff3
```

| **File** | **Sequences (type)** | **Total length** | **Min. hit e-value** | **Min. hit bit-score** | **Min. % of identity** | **Min. % of query cov.** | **Min. % of subject cov.** | **Tax. scope** | **Orth. restrictions** | **GO evidence** |
|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|
| drosophila_proteins.fa | 13955 (proteins) | 7321147 | 0.001 | 60 | 40 | 20 | 20 | auto | all | non-electronic |

| **File** | **Sequences (type)** | **Total length** | **Min. hit e-value** | **Min. hit bit-score** | **Min. % of identity** | **Min. % of query cov.** | **Min. % of subject cov.** | **Tax. scope** | **Orth. restrictions** | **GO evidence** |
|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|
| harmonia_proteins.fa | 25685 (proteins) | 9811406 | 0.001 | 60 | 40 | 20 | 20 | auto | all | non-electronic |

| **File** | **Sequences (type)** | **Total length** | **Min. hit e-value** | **Min. hit bit-score** | **Min. % of identity** | **Min. % of query cov.** | **Min. % of subject cov.** | **Tax. scope** | **Orth. restrictions** | **GO evidence** |
|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|
| plutella_proteins.fa | 29185 (proteins) | 9739172 | 0.001 | 60 | 40 | 20 | 20 | auto | all | non-electronic |

| **Date created** | **File** | **Sequences (type)** | **Total length** | **Min. hit e-value** | **Min. hit bit-score** | **Min. % of identity** | **Min. % of query cov.** | **Min. % of subject cov.** | **Tax. scope** | **Orth. restrictions** | **GO evidence** |
|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|----|
| 09/24/25 | blattella_proteins.fa.gz | 28106 (proteins) | 9442452 | 0.001 | 60 | 40 | 20 | 20 | auto | all | non-electronic |

# libraries

```{r}
library(clusterProfiler)
library(enrichplot)
library(tidyr)
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(pheatmap)
library(uwot)
library(readxl)
library(grid)
library(tibble)
library(GSVA)
library(princurve)
library(GO.db)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(pheatmap)
library(tidytext)
library(topGO)
library(Rgraphviz)
library(UpSetR)
library(forcats)


conflicted::conflict_prefer("select", "dplyr")
conflicted::conflict_prefer("filter", "dplyr")
conflicted::conflict_prefer("count", "dplyr")
conflicted::conflict_prefer("unname", "base")
conflicted::conflict_prefer("intersect", "base")
conflicted::conflict_prefer("union", "base")
conflicted::conflict_prefer("setdiff", "base")
conflicted::conflict_prefer("slice", "clusterProfiler")

```

# set-up

```{r}
dds <- readRDS("/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/dds.rds")
gene2og <- readRDS("/home/cluster_user/link_to_datadisk/copy/counts/gene2og.rds")

background_ogs <- rownames(dds)
length(background_ogs)
head(background_ogs)
length(rownames(gene2og))/5

#without renaming to anything there are errors
gene2og <- gene2og %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    gene_id = "Gene",
    og = "orthogroup"
  )
```

```{r}
stages <- c("Eggs", "Embryo", "Larva", "Nymph", "Prepupa", "Pupa", "Adult Male", "Adult Female")

all_sig_ogs <- list()

for(i in 1:(length(stages)-1)){
  for(j in (i+1):length(stages)){
    stage1 <- stages[i]
    stage2 <- stages[j]
    
    res <- results(dds, contrast = c("Stage2", stage2, stage1)) 
    
    sig_ogs <- rownames(res[which(res$padj < 0.05 & abs(res$log2FoldChange) > 1), ])
    
    contrast_name <- paste(stage2, "_vs_", stage1, sep="")
    all_sig_ogs[[contrast_name]] <- sig_ogs
  }
}

names(all_sig_ogs)
#lapply(all_sig_ogs, length)
```

# GO & KEGG

## Drosophila

```{r}
eggnog_drosophila <- read.table("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/drosophila.emapper.annotations.tsv",
                                sep = "\t",
                                header = FALSE,
                                comment.char = "#",
                                quote = "",
                                stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

colnames(eggnog_drosophila) <- c("query", "seed_ortholog", "evalue", "score", "eggNOG_OGs", 
                                 "max_annot_lvl", "COG_category", "Description", "Preferred_name",
                                 "GOs", "EC", "KEGG_ko", "KEGG_Pathway", "KEGG_Module",
                                 "KEGG_Reaction", "KEGG_rclass", "BRITE", "KEGG_TC",
                                 "CAZy", "BiGG_Reaction", "PFAMs")

#delete .1 from the end of names
eggnog_drosophila$query <- sub("\\.\\d+$", "", eggnog_drosophila$query)

head(eggnog_drosophila)

go_drosophila <- eggnog_drosophila %>%
  select(term = GOs, gene = query) %>%
  filter(!is.na(term) & term != "-") %>%
  separate_rows(term, sep = ",") %>%
  left_join(gene2og, by = c("gene" = "gene_id")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(og)) %>%
  select(term, gene = og) %>%
  distinct()

head(go_drosophila)

kegg_drosophila <- eggnog_drosophila %>%
  select(term = KEGG_Pathway, gene = query) %>%
  filter(!is.na(term) & term != "-") %>%
  separate_rows(term, sep = ",") %>%
  left_join(gene2og, by = c("gene" = "gene_id")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(og)) %>%
  select(term, gene = og) %>%
  distinct()

head(kegg_drosophila)
```

## Harmonia

```{r}
eggnog_harmonia <- read.table("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/harmonia.emapper.annotations.tsv",
                                sep = "\t",
                                header = FALSE,
                                comment.char = "#",
                                quote = "",
                                stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

colnames(eggnog_harmonia) <- c("query", "seed_ortholog", "evalue", "score", "eggNOG_OGs", 
                                 "max_annot_lvl", "COG_category", "Description", "Preferred_name",
                                 "GOs", "EC", "KEGG_ko", "KEGG_Pathway", "KEGG_Module",
                                 "KEGG_Reaction", "KEGG_rclass", "BRITE", "KEGG_TC",
                                 "CAZy", "BiGG_Reaction", "PFAMs")

#delete .1 from the end of names
eggnog_harmonia$query <- sub("\\.\\d+$", "", eggnog_harmonia$query)

head(eggnog_harmonia)

go_harmonia <- eggnog_harmonia %>%
  select(term = GOs, gene = query) %>%
  filter(!is.na(term) & term != "-") %>%
  separate_rows(term, sep = ",") %>%
  left_join(gene2og, by = c("gene" = "gene_id")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(og)) %>%
  select(term, gene = og) %>%
  distinct()

head(go_harmonia)

kegg_harmonia <- eggnog_harmonia %>%
  select(term = KEGG_Pathway, gene = query) %>%
  filter(!is.na(term) & term != "-") %>%
  separate_rows(term, sep = ",") %>%
  left_join(gene2og, by = c("gene" = "gene_id")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(og)) %>%
  select(term, gene = og) %>%
  distinct()

head(kegg_harmonia)
```

## Locusta

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: true
# head -n 4 /home/cluster_user/Magisterka/locusta1.emapper.annotations.tsv > /home/cluster_user/Magisterka/locusta.emapper.annotations.tsv  
# tail -n +5 /home/cluster_user/Magisterka/locusta1.emapper.annotations.tsv >> /home/cluster_user/Magisterka/locusta.emapper.annotations.tsv
# tail -n +5 /home/cluster_user/Magisterka/locusta2.emapper.annotations.tsv >> /home/cluster_user/Magisterka/locusta.emapper.annotations.tsv

# tail -n +5 /home/cluster_user/Magisterka/locusta4.emapper.annotations.tsv >> /home/cluster_user/Magisterka/locusta.emapper.annotations.tsv
# tail -n +5 /home/cluster_user/Magisterka/locusta5.emapper.annotations.tsv >> /home/cluster_user/Magisterka/locusta.emapper.annotations.tsv
```

```{r}
eggnog_locusta <- read.table("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/locusta.emapper.annotations.tsv",
                                sep = "\t",
                                header = FALSE,
                                comment.char = "#",
                                quote = "",
                                stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

colnames(eggnog_locusta) <- c("query", "seed_ortholog", "evalue", "score", "eggNOG_OGs", 
                                 "max_annot_lvl", "COG_category", "Description", "Preferred_name",
                                 "GOs", "EC", "KEGG_ko", "KEGG_Pathway", "KEGG_Module",
                                 "KEGG_Reaction", "KEGG_rclass", "BRITE", "KEGG_TC",
                                 "CAZy", "BiGG_Reaction", "PFAMs")

#delete .t1 .t2 from the end of names
eggnog_locusta$query <- sub("\\.t\\d+$", "", eggnog_locusta$query)

head(eggnog_locusta)

go_locusta <- eggnog_locusta %>%
  select(term = GOs, gene = query) %>%
  filter(!is.na(term) & term != "-") %>%
  separate_rows(term, sep = ",") %>%
  left_join(gene2og, by = c("gene" = "gene_id")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(og)) %>%
  select(term, gene = og) %>%
  distinct()

head(go_locusta)

kegg_locusta <- eggnog_locusta %>%
  select(term = KEGG_Pathway, gene = query) %>%
  filter(!is.na(term) & term != "-") %>%
  separate_rows(term, sep = ",") %>%
  left_join(gene2og, by = c("gene" = "gene_id")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(og)) %>%
  select(term, gene = og) %>%
  distinct()

head(kegg_locusta)
```

```{r}
                                 "max_annot_lvl", "COG_category", "Description", "Preferred_name",
                                 "GOs", "EC", "KEGG_ko", "KEGG_Pathway", "KEGG_Module",
```

```{r}
eggnog_blattella <- read_excel("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/blattella.emapper.annotations.xlsx", skip =2)


colnames(eggnog_blattella) <- c("query", "seed_ortholog", "evalue", "score", "eggNOG_OGs",

head(eggnog_blattella)

go_blattella <- eggnog_blattella %>%
  select(term = GOs, gene = query) %>%
  filter(!is.na(term) & term != "-") %>%
  separate_rows(term, sep = ",") %>%
  left_join(gene2og, by = c("gene" = "gene_id")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(og)) %>%
  select(term, gene = og) %>%
  distinct()

head(go_blattella)

kegg_blattella <- eggnog_blattella %>%
  select(term = KEGG_Pathway, gene = query) %>%
  filter(!is.na(term) & term != "-") %>%
  separate_rows(term, sep = ",") %>%
  left_join(gene2og, by = c("gene" = "gene_id")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(og)) %>%
  select(term, gene = og) %>%
  distinct()

head(kegg_blattella)
```

## t2g

```{r}
###enricher wont work because it needs many GOs with multiple orthogroups (dont have, 821 orthogroups is too little)

# to check: GOslim (from 15k to ...) -> can i get it?
#KEGG pathways (from 700 to over 3k)

#term to gene for all species
t2g_go_common <- bind_rows(go_drosophila, go_locusta, go_harmonia, go_plutella, go_blattella) %>%
   distinct()
# 
 t2g_kegg_common <- bind_rows(kegg_drosophila, kegg_locusta, kegg_harmonia, kegg_plutella, kegg_blattella) %>%
   distinct()

```

### gsea

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
vst <- varianceStabilizingTransformation(dds, blind = FALSE)
mat <- assay(vst)

#prepare gene sets
go_sets <- split(t2g_go_common$gene, t2g_go_common$term)
kegg_sets <- split(t2g_kegg_common$gene, t2g_kegg_common$term)

length(go_sets)
length(kegg_sets)
sapply(go_sets, length) %>% summary()
sapply(kegg_sets, length) %>% summary()

#check matrixStats version
packageVersion("matrixStats")
options(matrixStats.useNames = FALSE)

#GSVA (Gene Set Variation Analysis) using the ssGSEA method
#based on the vst matrix and orthogroup to term table it counts the activity of genes for each sample separately
#result is GO x samples matrix where the value is the enrichment score based on the ranking
gsva_go <- gsva(
  mat,
  go_sets,
  method = "ssgsea", #single-sample GSEA (gene expression -> rankings-> enrichment scores) -> separate for each sample
  #enrichment scores are normalized between samples by: background value, numbers of genes, enrichment ranges, centering around 0
  #-> so the result is relative to other samples as not an absolute value but a more/less <- from comparing the rankings
  min.sz = 3,
  max.sz = 2000,
  verbose = TRUE
)

gsva_kegg <- gsva(
  mat,
  kegg_sets,
  method = "ssgsea",
  min.sz = 3,
  max.sz = 2000,
  verbose = TRUE
)

dim(gsva_go)
dim(gsva_kegg)
```

## plots - go & kegg

go - pca

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
#transpose
gsva_go_t <- as.data.frame(t(gsva_go))
gsva_go_t$Sample <- rownames(gsva_go_t)

#metadata
sample_info <- as.data.frame(colData(dds))
sample_info$Sample <- rownames(sample_info)
sample_info <- sample_info %>% select(Sample, Sample2, Stage2, Species)

#merge
gsva_go_t <- left_join(gsva_go_t, sample_info, by = "Sample")

#median (of biological replicates)
gsva_go_median <- gsva_go_t %>%
  group_by(Sample2, Stage2, Species) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), median), .groups = "drop")

expr_values <- gsva_go_median %>% select(-Sample2, -Stage2, -Species)
exprs_mat <- t(as.matrix(expr_values))
colnames(exprs_mat) <- gsva_go_median$Sample2
rownames(exprs_mat) <- colnames(expr_values)

#pca, variance
pca_go <- prcomp(t(exprs_mat), scale. = TRUE)
percentVar_go <- round(100 * (pca_go$sdev^2 / sum(pca_go$sdev^2)), 1)

#data + metadata
pcaData_go <- as.data.frame(pca_go$x)
pcaData_go$Sample2 <- gsva_go_median$Sample2
pcaData_go$Stage2 <- gsva_go_median$Stage2
pcaData_go$Species <- gsva_go_median$Species

p_go <- ggplot(pcaData_go, aes(PC1, PC2, color = Stage2, shape = Species, label = Sample2)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3.5, max.overlaps = 1000) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", percentVar_go[1], "% variance")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", percentVar_go[2], "% variance")) +
  ggtitle("PCA of GO enrichment scores") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(color = "Stage", shape = "Species") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c(
      "drosophila" = 16,
      "blattella" = 17,
      "plutella" = 15,
      "locusta" = 3,
      "harmonia" = 7
    ),
    labels = c(
      "drosophila" = expression(italic("D. melanogaster")),
      "blattella" = expression(italic("B. germanica")),
      "plutella" = expression(italic("P. xylostella")),
      "locusta" = expression(italic("L. migratoria")),
      "harmonia" = expression(italic("H. axyridis"))
    )
  )

print(p_go)

ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/PCA_GO_stage_species.png",
       p_go, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

heatmap

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
#100 most changeable genes
var_idx <- order(apply(gsva_go, 1, var), decreasing = TRUE)[1:100]

species_labels <- c(
  "drosophila" = "D. melanogaster",
  "blattella"  = "B. germanica",
  "plutella"   = "P. xylostella",
  "locusta"    = "L. migratoria",
  "harmonia"   = "H. axyridis"
)

#annotate columns
ann_col <- gsva_go_median %>%
  select(Sample2, Stage2, Species) %>%
  dplyr::rename(Stage = Stage2) %>%
  column_to_rownames("Sample2")

ann_col$Species <- factor(species_labels[ann_col$Species],
                          levels = species_labels)

#colors from ggplot (pca, umap)
stages_order <- c("Adult Female", "Adult Male", "Eggs", "Embryo", "Larva", "Nymph", "Prepupa", "Pupa")
stage_colors <- setNames(scales::hue_pal()(length(stages_order)), stages_order)

species_levels <- unique(ann_col$Species)
species_colors <- setNames(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(n = length(species_levels), "Accent"),
                                 species_levels)

ann_colors <- list(Stage = stage_colors,
                   Species = species_colors)

heat_colors <- colorRampPalette(rev(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")))(100)
#heatmap
ph <- pheatmap(exprs_mat[var_idx, ],
         annotation_col = ann_col,
         annotation_colors = ann_colors,
         #normalization according to row
         scale = "row",
         clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
         clustering_distance_cols = "euclidean",
         clustering_method = "ward.D2",
         show_rownames = TRUE,
         show_colnames = TRUE,
         fontsize_col = 8,
         fontsize = 12,
         border_color = NA,
         angle_col = 45,
         fontsize_row = 5,
         main = "Top 100 variable GO terms",
         color = heat_colors
         )

grid.newpage()
grid.draw(ph$gtable)

ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/heatmap_GO_top100.png", ph, width = 11, height = 8)
```

umap

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
exprs_mat_t <- t(exprs_mat)

umap_res <- umap(exprs_mat_t, n_neighbors = 15, min_dist = 0.1, metric = "euclidean")

umap_df <- as.data.frame(umap_res)
colnames(umap_df) <- c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")

umap_df$Sample2 <- gsva_go_median$Sample2
umap_df$Stage2 <- gsva_go_median$Stage2
umap_df$Species <- gsva_go_median$Species

p_umap <- ggplot(umap_df, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, color = Stage2, shape = Species, label = Sample2)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3, max.overlaps = 1000) +
  ggtitle("UMAP of GO enrichment scores") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(color = "Stage", shape = "Species")

print(p_umap)

ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/UMAP_GO_stage_species.png",
       p_umap, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

pseudotime

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
print(percentVar_go)
print(sum(percentVar_go[0:6]))

#from pca matrix, first 6 main components (74.4% variance explained)
pc_mat_all <- as.matrix(pcaData_go[, paste0("PC", 1:6)])
rownames(pc_mat_all) <- pcaData_go$Sample2

#developmental curve
pc_curve_all <- principal_curve(pc_mat_all)

#pseudotime
lambda_all <- pc_curve_all$lambda
lambda_norm_all <- (lambda_all - min(lambda_all)) / (max(lambda_all) - min(lambda_all))

pcaData_go$Pseudotime <- lambda_norm_all

stages_order <- c("Eggs", "Embryo", "Larva", "Nymph", "Prepupa", "Pupa", "Adult Male", "Adult Female")

pcaData_go$Stage2 <- factor(pcaData_go$Stage2, levels = stages_order)
pcaData_go$Stage2 <- droplevels(pcaData_go$Stage2)

cor_test <- cor(as.numeric(factor(pcaData_go$Stage2, levels = stages_order)), pcaData_go$Pseudotime, use = "complete.obs")

print(cor_test)
#make sure pseudotime goes from eggs to adults and not from adult to eggs
if (cor_test < 0) {
  pcaData_go$Pseudotime <- 1 - pcaData_go$Pseudotime
}

p1 <- ggplot(pcaData_go, aes(x = Stage2, y = Pseudotime, fill = Stage2)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Stage",
    values = stage_colors
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
    ) +
  labs(
    title = "Pseudotime across stages (GOs) - PCA",
    y = "Pseudotime (normalized)",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )

print(p1)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime1_GO_stage_species.png",
       p1, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)

p2 <- ggplot(pcaData_go, aes(x = Stage2, y = Pseudotime, fill = Species)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8, position = position_dodge(0.8)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(5, "Accent"),
    breaks = names(species_labels),
    labels = species_labels
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "italic"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Pseudotime distribution (GOs) - PCA",
    y = "Pseudotime (normalized)",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )

print(p2)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime2_GO_stage_species.png",
       p2, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)

pseudotime_summary <- pcaData_go %>%
  group_by(Species, Stage2) %>%
  summarise(
    median_pseudo = median(Pseudotime),
    sd_pseudo = sd(Pseudotime),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

pseudotime_summary$Stage2 <- factor(pseudotime_summary$Stage2, levels = stages_order)
pseudotime_summary$Stage2 <- droplevels(pseudotime_summary$Stage2)

p3 <- ggplot(pseudotime_summary, aes(x = Stage2, y = median_pseudo, group = Species, color = Species)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(5, "Accent"),
    breaks = names(species_labels),
    labels = species_labels
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "italic"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Median pesudotime trajectory (GOs) - PCA",
    y = "Median pseudotime",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )

print(p3)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime3_GO_stage_species.png",
       p3, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

pca

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
curve_line <- as.data.frame(pc_curve_all$s)
colnames(curve_line) <- paste0("PC", 1:6)
#sort point
curve_line <- curve_line[order(pcaData_go$Pseudotime), ]

#pca plot with trajectory curve
p_curve <- ggplot(pcaData_go, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Pseudotime, shape = Stage2, label = Sample2)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3.5, max.overlaps = 1000) +
  geom_path(data = curve_line, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2), inherit.aes = FALSE, 
            color = "black", size = 1.2, alpha = 0.7) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", percentVar_go[1], "% variance")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", percentVar_go[2], "% variance")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8)) +
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Median pesudotime trajectory on PCA plot (GOs)",
    color = "Pseudotime",
    shape = "Stage"
  )

print(p_curve)

ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime_pca_GO_stage_species.png",
        p_curve, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

umap

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
umap_mat_all <- as.matrix(umap_df[, c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")])
rownames(umap_mat_all) <- umap_df$Sample2

#match curve on umap
umap_curve_all <- principal_curve(umap_mat_all)

#count pseudotime
lambda_all <- umap_curve_all$lambda
lambda_norm_all <- (lambda_all - min(lambda_all)) / (max(lambda_all) - min(lambda_all))
umap_df$Pseudotime <- lambda_norm_all

#check pseudotime direction
stages_order <- c("Eggs", "Embryo", "Larva", "Nymph", "Prepupa", "Pupa", "Adult Male", "Adult Female")
umap_df$Stage2 <- factor(umap_df$Stage2, levels = stages_order)
umap_df$Stage2 <- droplevels(umap_df$Stage2)

cor_test <- cor(as.numeric(factor(umap_df$Stage2, levels = stages_order)),
                umap_df$Pseudotime, use = "complete.obs")
print(cor_test)

#swap pseudotime if needed
if (cor_test < 0) {
  umap_df$Pseudotime <- 1 - umap_df$Pseudotime
}

#plots

#pseudotime vs stage
p1 <- ggplot(umap_df, aes(x = Stage2, y = Pseudotime, fill = Stage2)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Stage",
    values = stage_colors
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
    ) +
  labs(
    title = "Pseudotime across stages (GOs) - UMAP",
    y = "Pseudotime (normalized)",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )
print(p1)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime1_umap_GO_stage_species.png", p1, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)

#pseudotime vs stage+species
p2 <- ggplot(umap_df, aes(x = Stage2, y = Pseudotime, fill = Species)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8, position = position_dodge(0.8)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(5, "Accent"),
    breaks = names(species_labels),
    labels = species_labels
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "italic"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Pseudotime distribution (GOs) - UMAP",
    y = "Pseudotime (normalized)",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )
print(p2)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime2_umap_GO_stage_species.png", p2, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)

#pseudotime summary line plot
pseudotime_summary <- umap_df %>%
  group_by(Species, Stage2) %>%
  summarise(
    median_pseudo = median(Pseudotime),
    sd_pseudo = sd(Pseudotime),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
pseudotime_summary$Stage2 <- factor(pseudotime_summary$Stage2, levels = stages_order)
pseudotime_summary$Stage2 <- droplevels(pseudotime_summary$Stage2)

p3 <- ggplot(pseudotime_summary, aes(x = Stage2, y = median_pseudo, group = Species, color = Species)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(5, "Accent"),
    breaks = names(species_labels),
    labels = species_labels
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "italic"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Median pesudotime trajectory (GOs) - UMAP",
    y = "Median pseudotime",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )
print(p3)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime3_umap_GO_stage_species.png", p3, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)

#trajectory curve
curve_line <- as.data.frame(umap_curve_all$s)
colnames(curve_line) <- c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")
curve_line <- curve_line[order(umap_df$Pseudotime), ]

#umap plot
p_umap_curve <- ggplot(umap_df, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, color = Pseudotime, shape = Stage2, label = Sample2)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3.5, max.overlaps = 1000) +
  geom_path(
    data = curve_line,
    aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "black",
    size = 1.2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8)) +
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Median pesudotime trajectory on UMAP (GOs)",
    x = "UMAP1",
    y = "UMAP2",
    color = "Pseudotime",
    shape = "Stage"
  )

print(p_umap_curve)

ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime_umap_GO_stage_species.png",
       p_umap_curve, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

kegg pathways - pca

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
#transpose
gsva_kegg_t <- as.data.frame(t(gsva_kegg))
gsva_kegg_t$Sample <- rownames(gsva_kegg_t)

#metadata
sample_info <- as.data.frame(colData(dds))
sample_info$Sample <- rownames(sample_info)
sample_info <- sample_info %>% select(Sample, Sample2, Stage2, Species)

#merge
gsva_kegg_t <- left_join(gsva_kegg_t, sample_info, by = "Sample")

#median
gsva_kegg_median <- gsva_kegg_t %>%
  group_by(Sample2, Stage2, Species) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), median), .groups = "drop")

expr_values <- gsva_kegg_median %>% select(-Sample2, -Stage2, -Species)
exprs_mat <- t(as.matrix(expr_values))
colnames(exprs_mat) <- gsva_kegg_median$Sample2
rownames(exprs_mat) <- colnames(expr_values)

#pca, variance
pca_kegg <- prcomp(t(exprs_mat), scale. = TRUE)
percentVar_kegg <- round(100 * (pca_kegg$sdev^2 / sum(pca_kegg$sdev^2)), 1)

#data + metadata
pcaData_kegg <- as.data.frame(pca_kegg$x)
pcaData_kegg$Sample2 <- gsva_kegg_median$Sample2
pcaData_kegg$Stage2 <- gsva_kegg_median$Stage2
pcaData_kegg$Species <- gsva_kegg_median$Species

p_kegg <- ggplot(pcaData_kegg, aes(PC1, PC2, color = Stage2, shape = Species, label = Sample2)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3.5, max.overlaps = 1000) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", percentVar_kegg[1], "% variance")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", percentVar_kegg[2], "% variance")) +
  ggtitle("PCA of KEGG enrichment scores") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(color = "Stage", shape = "Species") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c(
      "drosophila" = 16,
      "blattella" = 17,
      "plutella" = 15,
      "locusta" = 3,
      "harmonia" = 7
    ),
    labels = c(
      "drosophila" = expression(italic("D. melanogaster")),
      "blattella" = expression(italic("B. germanica")),
      "plutella" = expression(italic("P. xylostella")),
      "locusta" = expression(italic("L. migratoria")),
      "harmonia" = expression(italic("H. axyridis"))
    )
  )

print(p_kegg)

ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/PCA_KEGG_stage_species.png",
       p_kegg, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

heatmap

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
#100 most changeable genes
var_idx <- order(apply(gsva_kegg, 1, var), decreasing = TRUE)[1:100]

#annotate columns
ann_col <- gsva_kegg_median %>%
  select(Sample2, Stage2, Species) %>%
  dplyr::rename(Stage = Stage2) %>%
  column_to_rownames("Sample2")

ann_col$Species <- factor(species_labels[ann_col$Species],
                          levels = species_labels)

#colors from ggplot (pca, umap)
stages_order <- c("Adult Female", "Adult Male", "Eggs", "Embryo", "Larva", "Nymph", "Prepupa", "Pupa")
stage_colors <- setNames(scales::hue_pal()(length(stages_order)), stages_order)


species_levels <- unique(ann_col$Species)
species_colors <- setNames(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(n = length(species_levels), "Accent"),
                                 species_levels)

ann_colors <- list(Stage = stage_colors,
                   Species = species_colors)
#heatmap
ph <- pheatmap(exprs_mat[var_idx, ],
         annotation_col = ann_col,
         annotation_colors = ann_colors,
         scale = "row",
         clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
         clustering_distance_cols = "euclidean",
         clustering_method = "ward.D2",
         show_rownames = TRUE,
         show_colnames = TRUE,
         fontsize_col = 8,
         fontsize = 12,
         border_color = NA,
         angle_col = 45,
         fontsize_row = 5,
         main = "Top 100 variable KEGG terms",
         color = heat_colors
         )

grid.newpage()
grid.draw(ph$gtable)

ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/heatmap_kegg_top100.png", ph, width = 11, height = 8)
```

umap

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
exprs_mat_t <- t(exprs_mat)

umap_res <- umap(exprs_mat_t, n_neighbors = 15, min_dist = 0.1, metric = "euclidean")

umap_df <- as.data.frame(umap_res)
colnames(umap_df) <- c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")

umap_df$Sample2 <- gsva_kegg_median$Sample2
umap_df$Stage2 <- gsva_kegg_median$Stage2
umap_df$Species <- gsva_kegg_median$Species

p_umap <- ggplot(umap_df, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, color = Stage2, shape = Species, label = Sample2)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3, max.overlaps = 1000) +
  ggtitle("UMAP of KEGG enrichment scores") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(color = "Stage", shape = "Species")

print(p_umap)

ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/UMAP_kegg_stage_species.png",
       p_umap, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

pseudotime

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
print(percentVar_kegg)
print(sum(percentVar_kegg[0:6]))

#from pca matrix, first 6 main components (73.1% variance explained)
pc_mat_all <- as.matrix(pcaData_kegg[, paste0("PC", 1:6)])
rownames(pc_mat_all) <- pcaData_kegg$Sample2

#developmental curve
pc_curve_all <- principal_curve(pc_mat_all)

#pseudotime
lambda_all <- pc_curve_all$lambda
lambda_norm_all <- (lambda_all - min(lambda_all)) / (max(lambda_all) - min(lambda_all))

pcaData_kegg$Pseudotime <- lambda_norm_all

stages_order <- c("Eggs", "Embryo", "Larva", "Nymph", "Prepupa", "Pupa", "Adult Male", "Adult Female")

pcaData_kegg$Stage2 <- factor(pcaData_kegg$Stage2, levels = stages_order)
pcaData_kegg$Stage2 <- droplevels(pcaData_kegg$Stage2)

cor_test <- cor(as.numeric(factor(pcaData_kegg$Stage2, levels = stages_order)), pcaData_kegg$Pseudotime, use = "complete.obs")

print(cor_test)
#make sure pseudotime goes from eggs to adults and not from adult to eggs
if (cor_test < 0) {
  pcaData_kegg$Pseudotime <- 1 - pcaData_kegg$Pseudotime
}

p1 <- ggplot(pcaData_kegg, aes(x = Stage2, y = Pseudotime, fill = Stage2)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Stage",
    values = stage_colors
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
    ) +
  labs(
    title = "Pseudotime across stages (KEGG pathways) - PCA",
    y = "Pseudotime (normalized)",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )

print(p1)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime1_kegg_stage_species.png",
       p1, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)

p2 <- ggplot(pcaData_kegg, aes(x = Stage2, y = Pseudotime, fill = Species)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8, position = position_dodge(0.8)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(5, "Accent"),
    breaks = names(species_labels),
    labels = species_labels
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "italic"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Pseudotime distribution (KEGG pathways) - PCA",
    y = "Pseudotime (normalized)",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )

print(p2)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime2_kegg_stage_species.png",
       p2, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)

pseudotime_summary <- pcaData_kegg %>%
  group_by(Species, Stage2) %>%
  summarise(
    median_pseudo = median(Pseudotime),
    sd_pseudo = sd(Pseudotime),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

pseudotime_summary$Stage2 <- factor(pseudotime_summary$Stage2, levels = stages_order)
pseudotime_summary$Stage2 <- droplevels(pseudotime_summary$Stage2)

p3 <- ggplot(pseudotime_summary, aes(x = Stage2, y = median_pseudo, group = Species, color = Species)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(5, "Accent"),
    breaks = names(species_labels),
    labels = species_labels
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "italic"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Median pesudotime trajectory (KEGG pathways) - PCA",
    y = "Median pseudotime",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )

print(p3)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime3_kegg_stage_species.png",
       p3, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

pca

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
curve_line <- as.data.frame(pc_curve_all$s)
colnames(curve_line) <- paste0("PC", 1:6)
#sort point
curve_line <- curve_line[order(pcaData_kegg$Pseudotime), ]

#pca plot with trajectory curve
p_curve <- ggplot(pcaData_kegg, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Pseudotime, shape = Stage2, label = Sample2)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3.5, max.overlaps = 1000) +
  geom_path(data = curve_line, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2), inherit.aes = FALSE, 
            color = "black", size = 1.2, alpha = 0.7) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", percentVar_kegg[1], "% variance")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", percentVar_kegg[2], "% variance")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8)) +
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Median pesudotime trajectory on PCA plot (KEGG pathways)",
    color = "Pseudotime",
    shape = "Stage"
  )

print(p_curve)

ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime_pca_kegg_stage_species.png",
        p_curve, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

umap

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
umap_mat_all <- as.matrix(umap_df[, c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")])
rownames(umap_mat_all) <- umap_df$Sample2

#match curve on umap
umap_curve_all <- principal_curve(umap_mat_all)

#count pseudotime
lambda_all <- umap_curve_all$lambda
lambda_norm_all <- (lambda_all - min(lambda_all)) / (max(lambda_all) - min(lambda_all))
umap_df$Pseudotime <- lambda_norm_all

#check pseudotime direction
stages_order <- c("Eggs", "Embryo", "Larva", "Nymph", "Prepupa", "Pupa", "Adult Male", "Adult Female")
umap_df$Stage2 <- factor(umap_df$Stage2, levels = stages_order)
umap_df$Stage2 <- droplevels(umap_df$Stage2)

cor_test <- cor(as.numeric(factor(umap_df$Stage2, levels = stages_order)),
                umap_df$Pseudotime, use = "complete.obs")
print(cor_test)

#swap pseudotime if needed
if (cor_test < 0) {
  umap_df$Pseudotime <- 1 - umap_df$Pseudotime
}

#plots

#pseudotime vs stage
p1 <- ggplot(umap_df, aes(x = Stage2, y = Pseudotime, fill = Stage2)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Stage",
    values = stage_colors
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
    ) +
  labs(
    title = "Pseudotime across stages (KEGG pathways) - UMAP",
    y = "Pseudotime (normalized)",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )
print(p1)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime1_umap_KEGG_stage_species.png", p1, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)

#pseudotime vs stage+species
p2 <- ggplot(umap_df, aes(x = Stage2, y = Pseudotime, fill = Species)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8, position = position_dodge(0.8)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(5, "Accent"),
    breaks = names(species_labels),
    labels = species_labels
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "italic"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Pseudotime distribution (KEGG pathways) - UMAP",
    y = "Pseudotime (normalized)",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )
print(p2)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime2_umap_KEGG_stage_species.png", p2, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)

#pseudotime summary line plot
pseudotime_summary <- umap_df %>%
  group_by(Species, Stage2) %>%
  summarise(
    median_pseudo = median(Pseudotime),
    sd_pseudo = sd(Pseudotime),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
pseudotime_summary$Stage2 <- factor(pseudotime_summary$Stage2, levels = stages_order)
pseudotime_summary$Stage2 <- droplevels(pseudotime_summary$Stage2)

p3 <- ggplot(pseudotime_summary, aes(x = Stage2, y = median_pseudo, group = Species, color = Species)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(5, "Accent"),
    breaks = names(species_labels),
    labels = species_labels
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "italic"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Median pesudotime trajectory (KEGG pathways) - UMAP",
    y = "Median pseudotime",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )
print(p3)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime3_umap_KEGG_stage_species.png", p3, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)

#trajectory curve
curve_line <- as.data.frame(umap_curve_all$s)
colnames(curve_line) <- c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")
curve_line <- curve_line[order(umap_df$Pseudotime), ]

#umap plot
p_umap_curve <- ggplot(umap_df, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, color = Pseudotime, shape = Stage2, label = Sample2)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3.5, max.overlaps = 1000) +
  geom_path(
    data = curve_line,
    aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "black",
    size = 1.2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8)) +
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Median pesudotime trajectory on UMAP (KEGG pathways)",
    x = "UMAP1",
    y = "UMAP2",
    color = "Pseudotime",
    shape = "Stage"
  )

print(p_umap_curve)

ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime_umap_KEGG_stage_species.png",
       p_umap_curve, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

## no species effect

go - pca

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
species <- colData(dds)[colnames(gsva_go), "Species"]

#delete species effect by linear function
residuals_go <- apply(gsva_go, 1, function(x) {
  lm(x ~ species)$residuals
})
residuals_go <- t(residuals_go)
colnames(residuals_go) <- colnames(gsva_go)
rownames(residuals_go) <- rownames(gsva_go)

#median
resid_df <- as.data.frame(t(residuals_go))
resid_df$Sample <- rownames(resid_df)

sample_info <- data.frame(colData(dds))
sample_info$Sample <- rownames(sample_info)
sample_info <- sample_info %>% select(Sample, Sample2, Stage2, Species)

resid_df <- dplyr::left_join(resid_df, sample_info, by = "Sample")

resid_median <- resid_df %>%
  group_by(Sample2, Stage2, Species) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), median), .groups = "drop")

expr_median <- resid_median %>% select(-Stage2, -Species)
samples <- resid_median$Sample2
expr_values <- resid_median %>% select(-Sample2, -Stage2, -Species)

exprs_mat <- t(as.matrix(expr_values))
colnames(exprs_mat) <- resid_median$Sample2
rownames(exprs_mat) <- colnames(expr_values)

#pca, variance
pca_go <- prcomp(t(exprs_mat), scale. = TRUE)
percentVar_go <- round(100 * (pca_go$sdev^2 / sum(pca_go$sdev^2)), 1)

#data + metadata
pcaData_go <- as.data.frame(pca_go$x)
pcaData_go$Sample2 <- resid_median$Sample2
pcaData_go$Stage2 <- resid_median$Stage2
pcaData_go$Species <- resid_median$Species

p_go <- ggplot(pcaData_go, aes(PC1, PC2, color = Stage2, shape = Species, label = Sample2)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3.5, max.overlaps = 1000) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", percentVar_go[1], "% variance")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", percentVar_go[2], "% variance")) +
  ggtitle("PCA of GO enrichment scores (removed species effect)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(color = "Stage", shape = "Species") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c(
      "drosophila" = 16,
      "blattella" = 17,
      "plutella" = 15,
      "locusta" = 3,
      "harmonia" = 7
    ),
    labels = c(
      "drosophila" = expression(italic("D. melanogaster")),
      "blattella" = expression(italic("B. germanica")),
      "plutella" = expression(italic("P. xylostella")),
      "locusta" = expression(italic("L. migratoria")),
      "harmonia" = expression(italic("H. axyridis"))
    )
  )

print(p_go)

ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/PCA_GO_stage.png",
       p_go, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

heatmap

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
#100 most changeable genes
var_idx <- order(apply(exprs_mat, 1, var), decreasing = TRUE)[1:100]

#annotate columns
ann_col <- data.frame(
  Stage = resid_median$Stage2,
  Species = resid_median$Species
)
rownames(ann_col) <- colnames(exprs_mat)

ann_col$Species <- factor(species_labels[ann_col$Species],
                          levels = species_labels)

#colors from ggplot (pca, umap)
stages_order <- c("Adult Female", "Adult Male", "Eggs", "Embryo", "Larva", "Nymph", "Prepupa", "Pupa")
stage_colors <- setNames(scales::hue_pal()(length(stages_order)), stages_order)


species_levels <- unique(ann_col$Species)
species_colors_named <- setNames(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(n = length(species_levels), "Accent"),
                                 species_levels)
ann_colors <- list(Stage = stage_colors,
                   Species = species_colors_named)

#heatmap
ph <- pheatmap(exprs_mat[var_idx, ],
         annotation_col = ann_col,
         annotation_colors = ann_colors,
         scale = "row",
         clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
         clustering_distance_cols = "euclidean",
         clustering_method = "ward.D2",
         show_rownames = TRUE,
         show_colnames = TRUE,
         fontsize_col = 8,
         fontsize = 12,
         border_color = NA,
         angle_col = 45,
         fontsize_row = 5,
         main = "Top 100 variable GO terms(removed species effect)",
         color = heat_colors
         )

grid.newpage()
grid.draw(ph$gtable)

ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/heatmap_GO_top100_stage.png", ph, width = 11, height = 8)
```

umap

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
exprs_mat_t <- t(exprs_mat)

umap_res <- umap(exprs_mat_t, n_neighbors = 15, min_dist = 0.1, metric = "euclidean")

umap_df <- as.data.frame(umap_res)
colnames(umap_df) <- c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")

umap_df$Sample2 <- resid_median$Sample2
umap_df$Stage2 <- resid_median$Stage2
umap_df$Species <- resid_median$Species

p_umap <- ggplot(umap_df, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, color = Stage2, shape = Species, label = Sample2)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3, max.overlaps = 1000) +
  ggtitle("UMAP of GO enrichment scores (removed species effect)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(color = "Stage", shape = "Species")

print(p_umap)

ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/UMAP_GO_stage.png",
       p_umap, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

pseudotime

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
print(percentVar_go)
print(sum(percentVar_go[0:6]))

#from pca matrix, first 6 main components (71.9% variance explained)
pc_mat_all <- as.matrix(pcaData_go[, paste0("PC", 1:6)])
rownames(pc_mat_all) <- pcaData_go$Sample2

#developmental curve
pc_curve_all <- principal_curve(pc_mat_all)

#pseudotime
lambda_all <- pc_curve_all$lambda
lambda_norm_all <- (lambda_all - min(lambda_all)) / (max(lambda_all) - min(lambda_all))

pcaData_go$Pseudotime <- lambda_norm_all

stages_order <- c("Eggs", "Embryo", "Larva", "Nymph", "Prepupa", "Pupa", "Adult Male", "Adult Female")

pcaData_go$Stage2 <- factor(pcaData_go$Stage2, levels = stages_order)
pcaData_go$Stage2 <- droplevels(pcaData_go$Stage2)

cor_test <- cor(as.numeric(factor(pcaData_go$Stage2, levels = stages_order)), pcaData_go$Pseudotime, use = "complete.obs")

print(cor_test)
#make sure pseudotime goes from eggs to adults and not from adult to eggs
if (cor_test < 0) {
  pcaData_go$Pseudotime <- 1 - pcaData_go$Pseudotime
}

p1 <- ggplot(pcaData_go, aes(x = Stage2, y = Pseudotime, fill = Stage2)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Stage",
    values = stage_colors
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
    ) +
  labs(
    title = "Pseudotime across stages (GOs, removed species effect) - PCA",
    y = "Pseudotime (normalized)",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )

print(p1)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime1_GO_stage.png",
       p1, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)

p2 <- ggplot(pcaData_go, aes(x = Stage2, y = Pseudotime, fill = Species)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8, position = position_dodge(0.8)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(5, "Accent"),
    breaks = names(species_labels),
    labels = species_labels
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "italic"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Pseudotime distribution (GOs, removed species effect) - PCA",
    y = "Pseudotime (normalized)",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )

print(p2)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime2_GO_stage.png",
       p2, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)

pseudotime_summary <- pcaData_go %>%
  group_by(Species, Stage2) %>%
  summarise(
    median_pseudo = median(Pseudotime),
    sd_pseudo = sd(Pseudotime),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

pseudotime_summary$Stage2 <- factor(pseudotime_summary$Stage2, levels = stages_order)
pseudotime_summary$Stage2 <- droplevels(pseudotime_summary$Stage2)

p3 <- ggplot(pseudotime_summary, aes(x = Stage2, y = median_pseudo, group = Species, color = Species)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(5, "Accent"),
    breaks = names(species_labels),
    labels = species_labels
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "italic"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Median pesudotime trajectory (GOs, removed species effect) - PCA",
    y = "Median pseudotime",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )

print(p3)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime3_GO_stage.png",
       p3, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

pca

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
curve_line <- as.data.frame(pc_curve_all$s)
colnames(curve_line) <- paste0("PC", 1:6)
#sort point
curve_line <- curve_line[order(pcaData_go$Pseudotime), ]

#pca plot with trajectory curve
p_curve <- ggplot(pcaData_go, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = Pseudotime, shape = Stage2, label = Sample2)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3.5, max.overlaps = 1000) +
  geom_path(data = curve_line, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2), inherit.aes = FALSE, 
            color = "black", size = 1.2, alpha = 0.7) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", percentVar_go[1], "% variance")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", percentVar_go[2], "% variance")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8)) +
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Median pesudotime trajectory on PCA plot (GOs, removed species effect)",
    color = "Pseudotime",
    shape = "Stage"
  )

print(p_curve)

ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime_pca_GO_stage.png",
        p_curve, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

umap

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
umap_mat_all <- as.matrix(umap_df[, c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")])
rownames(umap_mat_all) <- umap_df$Sample2

#match curve on umap
umap_curve_all <- principal_curve(umap_mat_all)

#count pseudotime
lambda_all <- umap_curve_all$lambda
lambda_norm_all <- (lambda_all - min(lambda_all)) / (max(lambda_all) - min(lambda_all))
umap_df$Pseudotime <- lambda_norm_all

#check pseudotime direction
stages_order <- c("Eggs", "Embryo", "Larva", "Nymph", "Prepupa", "Pupa", "Adult Male", "Adult Female")
umap_df$Stage2 <- factor(umap_df$Stage2, levels = stages_order)
umap_df$Stage2 <- droplevels(umap_df$Stage2)

cor_test <- cor(as.numeric(factor(umap_df$Stage2, levels = stages_order)),
                umap_df$Pseudotime, use = "complete.obs")
print(cor_test)

#swap pseudotime if needed
if (cor_test < 0) {
  umap_df$Pseudotime <- 1 - umap_df$Pseudotime
}

#plots

#pseudotime vs stage
p1 <- ggplot(umap_df, aes(x = Stage2, y = Pseudotime, fill = Stage2)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Stage",
    values = stage_colors
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
    ) +
  labs(
    title = "Pseudotime across stages (GOs, removed species effect) - UMAP",
    y = "Pseudotime (normalized)",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )
print(p1)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime1_umap_GO_stage.png", p1, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)

#pseudotime vs stage+species
p2 <- ggplot(umap_df, aes(x = Stage2, y = Pseudotime, fill = Species)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8, position = position_dodge(0.8)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(5, "Accent"),
    breaks = names(species_labels),
    labels = species_labels
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "italic"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Pseudotime distribution (GOs, removed species effect) - UMAP",
    y = "Pseudotime (normalized)",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )
print(p2)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime2_umap_GO_stage.png", p2, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)

#pseudotime summary line plot
pseudotime_summary <- umap_df %>%
  group_by(Species, Stage2) %>%
  summarise(
    median_pseudo = median(Pseudotime),
    sd_pseudo = sd(Pseudotime),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
pseudotime_summary$Stage2 <- factor(pseudotime_summary$Stage2, levels = stages_order)
pseudotime_summary$Stage2 <- droplevels(pseudotime_summary$Stage2)

p3 <- ggplot(pseudotime_summary, aes(x = Stage2, y = median_pseudo, group = Species, color = Species)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(5, "Accent"),
    breaks = names(species_labels),
    labels = species_labels
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "italic"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Median pesudotime trajectory (GOs, removed species effect) - UMAP",
    y = "Median pseudotime",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )
print(p3)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime3_umap_GO_stage.png", p3, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)

#trajectory curve
curve_line <- as.data.frame(umap_curve_all$s)
colnames(curve_line) <- c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")
curve_line <- curve_line[order(umap_df$Pseudotime), ]

#umap plot
p_umap_curve <- ggplot(umap_df, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, color = Pseudotime, shape = Stage2, label = Sample2)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3.5, max.overlaps = 1000) +
  geom_path(
    data = curve_line,
    aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "black",
    size = 1.2,
    alpha = 0.7
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8)) +
  scale_color_viridis_c() +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Median pesudotime trajectory on UMAP (GOs, removed species effect)",
    x = "UMAP1",
    y = "UMAP2",
    color = "Pseudotime",
    shape = "Stage"
  )

print(p_umap_curve)

ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime_umap_GO_stage.png",
       p_umap_curve, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

kegg pathway - pca

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
species <- colData(dds)[colnames(gsva_kegg), "Species"]

#delete species effect by linear function
residuals_KEGG <- apply(gsva_kegg, 1, function(x) {
  lm(x ~ species)$residuals
})
residuals_KEGG <- t(residuals_KEGG)
colnames(residuals_KEGG) <- colnames(gsva_kegg)
rownames(residuals_KEGG) <- rownames(gsva_kegg)

#median
resid_df <- as.data.frame(t(residuals_KEGG))
resid_df$Sample <- rownames(resid_df)

sample_info <- data.frame(colData(dds))
sample_info$Sample <- rownames(sample_info)
sample_info <- sample_info %>% select(Sample, Sample2, Stage2, Species)

resid_df <- dplyr::left_join(resid_df, sample_info, by = "Sample")

resid_median <- resid_df %>%
  group_by(Sample2, Stage2, Species) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), median), .groups = "drop")

expr_median <- resid_median %>% select(-Stage2, -Species)
samples <- resid_median$Sample2
expr_values <- resid_median %>% select(-Sample2, -Stage2, -Species)

exprs_mat <- t(as.matrix(expr_values))
colnames(exprs_mat) <- resid_median$Sample2
rownames(exprs_mat) <- colnames(expr_values)

#pca, variance
pca_KEGG <- prcomp(t(exprs_mat), scale. = TRUE)
percentVar_KEGG <- round(100 * (pca_KEGG$sdev^2 / sum(pca_KEGG$sdev^2)), 1)

#data + metadata
pcaData_KEGG <- as.data.frame(pca_KEGG$x)
pcaData_KEGG$Sample2 <- resid_median$Sample2
pcaData_KEGG$Stage2 <- resid_median$Stage2
pcaData_KEGG$Species <- resid_median$Species

p_KEGG <- ggplot(pcaData_KEGG, aes(PC1, PC2, color = Stage2, shape = Species, label = Sample2)) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3.5, max.overlaps = 1000) +
  xlab(paste0("PC1: ", percentVar_KEGG[1], "% variance")) +
  ylab(paste0("PC2: ", percentVar_KEGG[2], "% variance")) +
  ggtitle("PCA of KEGG enrichment scores (removed species effect)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(color = "Stage", shape = "Species") +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c(
      "drosophila" = 16,
      "blattella" = 17,
      "plutella" = 15,
      "locusta" = 3,
      "harmonia" = 7
    ),
    labels = c(
      "drosophila" = expression(italic("D. melanogaster")),
      "blattella" = expression(italic("B. germanica")),
      "plutella" = expression(italic("P. xylostella")),
      "locusta" = expression(italic("L. migratoria")),
      "harmonia" = expression(italic("H. axyridis"))
    )
  )

print(p_KEGG)

ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/PCA_KEGG_stage.png",
       p_KEGG, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

heatmap

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
#100 most changeable genes
var_idx <- order(apply(exprs_mat, 1, var), decreasing = TRUE)[1:100]

#annotate columns
ann_col <- data.frame(
  Stage = resid_median$Stage2,
  Species = resid_median$Species
)
rownames(ann_col) <- colnames(exprs_mat)

ann_col$Species <- factor(species_labels[ann_col$Species],
                          levels = species_labels)

#colors from ggplot (pca, umap)
stages_order <- c("Adult Female", "Adult Male", "Eggs", "Embryo", "Larva", "Nymph", "Prepupa", "Pupa")
stage_colors <- setNames(scales::hue_pal()(length(stages_order)), stages_order)


species_levels <- unique(ann_col$Species)
species_colors_named <- setNames(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(n = length(species_levels), "Accent"),
                                 species_levels)
ann_colors <- list(Stage = stage_colors,
                   Species = species_colors_named)

#heatmap
ph <- pheatmap(exprs_mat[var_idx, ],
         annotation_col = ann_col,
         annotation_colors = ann_colors,
         scale = "row",
         clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
         clustering_distance_cols = "euclidean",
         clustering_method = "ward.D2",
         show_rownames = TRUE,
         show_colnames = TRUE,
         fontsize_col = 8,
         fontsize = 12,
         border_color = NA,
         angle_col = 45,
         fontsize_row = 5,
         main = "  Top 100 variable KEGG terms (removed species effect)",
         color = heat_colors
         )

grid.newpage()
grid.draw(ph$gtable)

ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/heatmap_KEGG_top100_stage.png", ph, width = 11, height = 8)
```

umap

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
exprs_mat_t <- t(exprs_mat)

umap_res <- umap(exprs_mat_t, n_neighbors = 15, min_dist = 0.1, metric = "euclidean")

umap_df <- as.data.frame(umap_res)
colnames(umap_df) <- c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")

umap_df$Sample2 <- resid_median$Sample2
umap_df$Stage2 <- resid_median$Stage2
umap_df$Species <- resid_median$Species

p_umap <- ggplot(umap_df, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2, color = Stage2, shape = Species, label = Sample2)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3, max.overlaps = 1000) +
  ggtitle("UMAP of KEGG enrichment scores (removed species effect)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(color = "Stage", shape = "Species")

print(p_umap)

ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/UMAP_KEGG_stage.png",
       p_umap, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

pseudotime

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
print(percentVar_KEGG)
print(sum(percentVar_KEGG[0:6]))

#from pca matrix, first 6 main components (70.9% variance explained)
pc_mat_all <- as.matrix(pcaData_KEGG[, paste0("PC", 1:6)])
rownames(pc_mat_all) <- pcaData_KEGG$Sample2

#developmental curve
pc_curve_all <- principal_curve(pc_mat_all)

#pseudotime
lambda_all <- pc_curve_all$lambda
lambda_norm_all <- (lambda_all - min(lambda_all)) / (max(lambda_all) - min(lambda_all))

pcaData_KEGG$Pseudotime <- lambda_norm_all

stages_order <- c("Eggs", "Embryo", "Larva", "Nymph", "Prepupa", "Pupa", "Adult Male", "Adult Female")

pcaData_KEGG$Stage2 <- factor(pcaData_KEGG$Stage2, levels = stages_order)
pcaData_KEGG$Stage2 <- droplevels(pcaData_KEGG$Stage2)

cor_test <- cor(as.numeric(factor(pcaData_KEGG$Stage2, levels = stages_order)), pcaData_KEGG$Pseudotime, use = "complete.obs")

print(cor_test)
#make sure pseudotime goes from eggs to adults and not from adult to eggs
if (cor_test < 0) {
  pcaData_KEGG$Pseudotime <- 1 - pcaData_KEGG$Pseudotime
}

p1 <- ggplot(pcaData_KEGG, aes(x = Stage2, y = Pseudotime, fill = Stage2)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Stage",
    values = stage_colors
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
    ) +
  labs(
    title = "Pseudotime across stages (KEGG pathways, removed species effect) - PCA",
    y = "Pseudotime (normalized)",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )

print(p1)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime1_kegg_stage.png",
       p1, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)

p2 <- ggplot(pcaData_KEGG, aes(x = Stage2, y = Pseudotime, fill = Species)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8, position = position_dodge(0.8)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(5, "Accent"),
    breaks = names(species_labels),
    labels = species_labels
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "italic"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Pseudotime distribution (KEGG pathways, removed species effect) - PCA",
    y = "Pseudotime (normalized)",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )

print(p2)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime2_kegg_stage.png",
       p2, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)

pseudotime_summary <- pcaData_KEGG %>%
  group_by(Species, Stage2) %>%
  summarise(
    median_pseudo = median(Pseudotime),
    sd_pseudo = sd(Pseudotime),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

pseudotime_summary$Stage2 <- factor(pseudotime_summary$Stage2, levels = stages_order)
pseudotime_summary$Stage2 <- droplevels(pseudotime_summary$Stage2)

p3 <- ggplot(pseudotime_summary, aes(x = Stage2, y = median_pseudo, group = Species, color = Species)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(5, "Accent"),
    breaks = names(species_labels),
    labels = species_labels
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "italic"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Median pesudotime trajectory (KEGG pathways, removed species effect) - PCA",
    y = "Median pseudotime",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )

print(p3)
ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime3_kegg_stage.png",
       p3, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
  ) +
```

umap

```{r}
#| eval: false
#| include: false
umap_mat_all <- as.matrix(umap_df[, c("UMAP1", "UMAP2")])
rownames(umap_mat_all) <- umap_df$Sample2

#match curve on umap
umap_curve_all <- principal_curve(umap_mat_all)

#count pseudotime
lambda_all <- umap_curve_all$lambda
lambda_norm_all <- (lambda_all - min(lambda_all)) / (max(lambda_all) - min(lambda_all))
umap_df$Pseudotime <- lambda_norm_all

#check pseudotime direction
stages_order <- c("Eggs", "Embryo", "Larva", "Nymph", "Prepupa", "Pupa", "Adult Male", "Adult Female")
umap_df$Stage2 <- factor(umap_df$Stage2, levels = stages_order)
umap_df$Stage2 <- droplevels(umap_df$Stage2)

cor_test <- cor(as.numeric(factor(umap_df$Stage2, levels = stages_order)),
                umap_df$Pseudotime, use = "complete.obs")
print(cor_test)

#swap pseudotime if needed
if (cor_test < 0) {
  umap_df$Pseudotime <- 1 - umap_df$Pseudotime
}

#plots

#pseudotime vs stage
p1 <- ggplot(umap_df, aes(x = Stage2, y = Pseudotime, fill = Stage2)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = "Stage",
    values = stage_colors
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
    ) +
  labs(
    title = "Pseudotime across stages (KEGG pathways, removed species effect) - UMAP",
    y = "Pseudotime (normalized)",
    x = "Developmental stage"
  )

#pseudotime vs stage+species

    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "italic"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")
  ) +

  )

  geom_point(size = 2.5, alpha = 0.8) +

    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),

    legend.title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold")

    title = "Median pesudotime trajectory on UMAP (KEGG pathways, removed species effect)",
    x = "UMAP1",
    y = "UMAP2",
    color = "Pseudotime",
    shape = "Stage"
  )

ggsave("/home/cluster_user/Magisterka/plots/pseudotime_umap_KEGG_stage.png",
```
